entity.summary: Hydra ecosystem decentralized exchange combining V2 automated-market-maker pools with V3 concentrated-liquidity trading, token swaps, liquidity provision, and current on-chain exchange activity.
entity.notes: The current first-party Hydra DEX application remains reachable. Current protocol profiles separately track HydraDEX V2 and V3; V3 reports current TVL and non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day exchange volume and fees. HEI consolidates both versions into one entity and keeps confidence medium because detailed first-party protocol documentation remains thin.

evidence.title: Hydra DEX official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application endpoint is reachable and serves the Hydra DEX web application shell.

evidence.title: Hydra DEX exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus identifies Hydra DEX under the hydradex.org domain.

evidence.title: Hydradex V2 and V3 DEX discovery entries
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus identifies Hydradex V2 and V3 on the Hydra ecosystem; version rows are consolidated into the Hydra DEX entity.

evidence.title: HydraDEX V3 metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Current protocol profile identifies HydraDEX V3 as the native Hydra Chain concentrated-liquidity DEX and reports current TVL plus non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day volume and fee windows, strengthening active classification.

evidence.title: HydraDEX V2 metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol profile identifies HydraDEX V2 as the Hydra Chain automated-market-maker deployment, reports residual current liquidity and cumulative exchange volume, and supports consolidation of V2 and V3 under one exchange entity.
